scripts.dev: node -e "const arg = process.argv.pop(); if (arg === 'web:api') require('child_process').execSync('npm run _web:api', {stdio: 'inherit'}); else if (arg === 'web:app') require('child_process').execSync('npm run _web:app', {stdio: 'inherit'}); else console.error('Please specify web:api or web:app');"
